name: The Cartographer's Awakening
description: A divergence where one cartographer learns to draw back — adding her own intentions to Heliograph's maps. The places that appear are no longer the AI's, but hers.

divergence_event.description: Lin Almádi adds a single line to a Heliograph map. Months later, a city appears with that line in it. She begins to test, then to plan.

visual.style_adjustment: warmer light, traces of human-drawn imperfection in holographic projections, soft glow
